content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 74% deployed with 9 open positions, most held <1 day. Session is net negative (-0.24%) with multiple binary earnings events imminent (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, NESTLEIND done, HUL Apr 30). VIX at 18.85 elevated. Priority is setting stop-losses on all unprotected positions and managing the open ADANIPOWER order, not adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entered at 81.50, now 78.48 (-3.7%). Strong Q4 beat (PAT +35% YoY), HDFC Sec TP 90, Systematix 88. Thesis intact but entry was near-top. Setting SL at 74 (~5.7% below entry, below recent swing support 72-73), target 88 for ~8% upside. R:R from current 1:2. Tight but gives room for PSU bank volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 995, +1.1%. Q4 PAT +19% YoY beat, Motilal upgrade to Buy, dividend hiked to Rs 8. SL 945 (~4% below entry, below 2026-04-20 low of 899 trimmed), target 1080 (below 52w high 1141). R:R ~1.9:1 on current."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 123.91 (-0.9%). Safe-haven hedge. SL 119 (~5% below entry, meaningful stop for commodity ETF), target 135 (~8% upside, aligns with Goldman $5,400/oz scenario)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1600.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1650, CMP 1693, +2.6%. Above 52w high breakout (prior 1640). Nabha acquisition accretive; Q4 on May 13. Trail SL to 1600 (just below entry, limits loss to ~3%), target 1820 (~10% upside). R:R ~1.3:1 but protecting against Kotak 'Reduce' overhang."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "new_target": 1550.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1412.94, CMP 1403 (-0.7%). Blowout Q4: PAT +27% (9-year high), rev +22.6%, EBITDA margin 26.3%. ICICI TP 1650, Axis TP 1640. Stock at 52w high after +21% monthly move — momentum exhaustion risk post-event. SL 1350 (~4.5% below entry, below today's low), target 1550 (~10% upside). Already delivered the catalyst; respect downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1049.05, CMP 1053, +0.4%. Strong provisional Q4: deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1% YoY. Q4 results Apr 27. SL 1005 (~4.2% below entry, below 20-day consolidation base), target 1140 (~8.7% upside, breakout extension). R:R ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 750.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 681, CMP 681 (flat). Q4 results Apr 29 — binary 6 days out. Q3 PAT +27.7%, at 52w high, ICICI Direct TP 770. SL 645 (~5.3% below entry, below 20-day SMA 625 cushion but tighter), target 750 (~10% upside). R:R 1.9:1. Thesis: ride into Q4."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 2372, CMP 2364.60 (-0.3%). FMCG defensive rotation, Q4 on Apr 30. SL 2280 (~3.9% below entry, below today's low 2336 and 20-day SMA zone), target 2520 (~6.2% upside). R:R ~1.6:1. Conservative sizing given post-gap entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 404.50, CMP 400.85 (-0.9%). Record FY26 capacity additions; Q4 on May 15; analyst TP 400-460. SL 385 (~4.8% below entry, below 20-day SMA 378 cushion), target 435 (~7.5% upside). R:R ~1.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 214 from prior session, CMP 214.60. Do NOT stack a duplicate. Stock at lifetime high going into Apr 29 earnings — binary event risk. Shooting Star candle on 04-20 is a warning. Already exposed to power cluster via TORNTPOWER + NTPC. Letting existing order work; will reassess next tick. If fills, power cluster weight needs monitoring."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Fundamentals strong post-Q4; holding for TP 88 with SL 74."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat + upgrade cycle; SL trails just below recent base."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven hedge; thesis intact with geopolitical/INR tailwinds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1600.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52w high; trail SL to cap loss at ~3%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1350.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-Q4 catalyst delivered; watching for follow-through; SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 27; strong provisional update already priced in part."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 29 catalyst; riding into event with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG rotation; Q4 Apr 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Power sector momentum; Q4 May 15; moderate upside band."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ADANIPOWER: existing BUY LIMIT at 214 still working — will let it fill or cancel next tick. TRITURBINE: 15x volume suspicious but unclear accumulation/distribution; profit -21% YoY despite record revenue — avoid. DEEPAKNTR, PIRAMALFIN, AUROPHARMA, DRREDDY, CIPLA, ELECON, TIINDIA, IEX, BHEL, WHIRLPOOL, AXISBANK, GAIL — no entries today; book is already 74% deployed with 9 names. WHIRLPOOL specifically flagged BEARISH with promoter-exit overhang — avoid. AXISBANK QIP dilution overhang caps upside. Would re-look at DRREDDY/CIPLA if pharma sector rotation continues and I can free up capital.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed (74%) on Day 4 with 9 positions all entered today — this is over-concentration of timing risk. Priority this tick was to set stops on every position (all were SL=0). Sector exposure: Power (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + pending ADANIPOWER) is building into a cluster — if ADANIPOWER fills, power weight approaches ~18% which is at the cluster-concentration limit; will not add more power. Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) is another cluster at ~15% — acceptable but capped. FMCG (NESTLEIND + HUL) ~8%. Going forward: no new entries until some of these positions either stop out or hit targets. Focus next tick on executing any trims and managing Q4 earnings binary events (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES/ADANIPOWER Apr 29, HUL Apr 30)."
}
